instruction: Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: There is an unauthorized buffer overflow vulnerability in Tenda AX12 v22.03.01.21 _ cn. This vulnerability can cause the web service not to restart or even execute arbitrary code. It is a different vulnerability from CVE-2022-2414.
output: Tenda AX12 version 22.03.01.21_cn contains an unauthorized buffer overflow vulnerability. This flaw can prevent the web service from restarting and may allow the execution of arbitrary code. It differs from CVE-2022-2414.
